meta.note: Citywide special-zone overlays. `provenance`: 'statutory' = encoded from the boundary text in the Admin Code (approximate geometry); 'illustrative' = placeholder pending the licensed/acquired dataset named in `dataset`. WTC is intentionally absent (conflict C-1).

properties.label: Midtown Core Zone
properties.source: Statutory boundary: 30th–65th St, Second Ave to Ninth/Columbus Ave (approximate)

properties.label: Downtown Flushing Zone
properties.source: Statutory boundary: Union St / Sanford Ave / College Point Blvd / Northern Blvd (approximate)

properties.label: Dyker Heights (seasonal)
properties.source: Statutory boundary: 10th–13th Ave, 81st–86th St (approximate). Holiday-season hours rule.

properties.label: Green Cart precinct 40 (illustrative)
properties.source: Illustrative precinct geography (South Bronx) pending DOHMH Green Cart polygons
